response_text:
No MaxClaw in the logs. The Discord bot connected but I can't access message history.

Here's what I found from logs today:

| Time | Event |
|------|-------|
| 9:47 PM | Discord started connecting |
| 9:55 PM | Config reload - token changed |
| 9:55 PM | Connected as @Black Roger |
| 10:03 PM | Another config reload |
| 10:03 PM | Connected as @Black Roger |

But no message content, no MaxClaw setup logs.

**What we can't recover:**
- Discord message history
- What exactly was done with MaxClaw

**What we can fix:**
- Make sure memory captures everything going forward
- Ensure the GitHub backup works
- Fix the crons (already done)

What do you want to do? Start fresh on the fixes?
